name: khoj
tagline: Your AI second brain. Self-hostable. Get answers from the web or your docs. Build custom agents, schedule automations, do deep research. Turn any online or local LLM into your personal, autonomous AI (gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral). Get started - free.
license: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0
search_text:
khoj your ai second brain. self-hostable. get answers from the web or your docs. build custom agents, schedule automations, do deep research. turn any online or local llm into your personal, autonomous ai (gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral). get started - free. agent ai assistant chat chatgpt emacs image-generation llama3 llamacpp llm obsidian obsidian-md offline-llm productivity rag research self-hosted semantic-search stt whatsapp-ai
